name: getSourceTaxonomyPredicates

returns.description: A SPARQL property-path string defining the taxonomy relation

name: getTopConcepts
description: Returns the top-level classes of an OWL source: `owl:Class` instances that have no parent

properties.name: selectGraph
properties.description: Also bind each triple's named graph (`?subjectGraph`)

properties.name: withoutImports
properties.description: Exclude imported graphs from the `FROM` clause

properties.name: skipTopClassFilter
properties.description: Do not apply any top-class filter

properties.name: filter
properties.description: Extra SPARQL filter appended after the top-class filter

properties.name: filterCollections
properties.description: Restrict to top concepts reachable from these SKOS collections

properties.name: returnQueryStr
properties.description: Return the SPARQL query string instead of executing it

returns.description: Throws an error or returns SPARQL results with variables: `topConcept` {string}, `topConceptLabel` {string} (optional), `subjectGraph` {string} (optional).

properties.name: inverseProperties
properties.description: Also return triples where the resource is the object

properties.name: noRestrictions
properties.description: Exclude values that are `owl:Restriction`

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Result limit (defaults to `Config.queryLimit`)

returns.description: Throws an error or returns SPARQL results with variables: `prop` {string}, `value` {string}, `propLabel` {string} (optional), `valueLabel` {string} (optional), `g` {string} (optional).

name: getNodeParents
description: Returns the ancestors of node(s) up to a given depth in an OWL hierarchy. Builds nested

name: getObjectRestrictions
description: Returns OWL restrictions on classes: matches `?subject rdfs:subClassOf ?node`, `?node

properties.description: Filter by restriction value URI(s)

properties.description: Select only `?prop`/`?propLabel`

properties.name: withoutBlankNodes

properties.name: withoutImports
properties.description: Exclude imported graphs from the `FROM` clause

properties.name: filter

properties.name: limit
properties.description: Result limit (defaults to `Config.queryLimit`)

returns.description: Throws an error or returns SPARQL results with variables: `subject` {string}, `subjectLabel` {string} (optional), `node` {string}, `prop` {string}, `propLabel` {string} (optional), `constraintType` {string}, `value` {string}, `valueLabel` {string} (optional), `cardinalityType` {string} (optional), `cardinalityValue` {string} (optional), `g` {string} (optional), `status` {string} (optional), `creationDate` {string} (optional), `creator` {string} (optional), `provenance` {string} (optional), `domainSourceLabel` {string} (optional), `rangeSourceLabel` {string} (optional). With `listPropertiesOnly`: `prop` {string}, `propLabel` {string} (optional). With `withoutBlankNodes`: `subject` {string}, `subjectLabel` {string} (optional), `prop` {string}, `propLabel` {string} (optional), `value` {string}, `valueLabel` {string} (optional), `constraintType` {string}. With `turtle`: RDF triples rather than bindings.
